resources.string: Put your finger on the sensor
"Xiaomi can encrypt and store your passwords so you can enter them automatically whenever you need them. We won't be able to read your encrypted passwords."
%1$s is requesting to use your passkey \"%2$s\" to sign in to %3$s.
%s is requesting to verify a passkey
Record a fingerprint to be able to use a passkey.
Turn on Password manager to be able to manage and use passkeys across all your Xiaomi devices.

Passkeys allow you to sign in to your accounts more quickly and securely than conventional sign-in methods. This passkey is associated with your fingerprint on this Xiaomi device and is synced between devices via Xiaomi Cloud services.
Sign in to your Xiaomi Account to be able to use a passkey.
Turn on Password manager to be able to use a passkey.
With Passwords, you can manage passwords for your app accounts. Passwords saved in Password manager and Mi Browser will be automatically transferred here.
For scanning QR codes to get tokens
For managing passwords for specific apps
For accessing and managing WLAN networks
"Couldn't sync passwords. Restart the app and try again."
Transfer your passwords from Mi Browser to Passwords to be able to autofill them
Install Passwords to be able to manage and autofill your passwords.
You can restore or permanently delete this password in Recently deleted.
All changes will be lost if you continue. Continue anyway?
If you delete this token without turning off related security features, you might not be able to sign in to your account. Delete anyway?
This item will be permanently deleted from the cloud and all your synced devices.
Password is used for multiple apps
A network error occurred. Check your network settings.
Enter passcode to sync your passwords stored in the cloud
Swipe down to switch to half screen
Swipe up to switch to half screen
Toolbar at the bottom of the screen
Tap to switch to Calendar view
Tap to switch to year view
Save your password to have it be filled in automatically next time you sign in.

"You've used this password multiple times. If leaked, it could compromise multiple accounts. Change it for your security. Passwords will redirect you to the corresponding app or web page to change it. If you haven't downloaded the app, you'll be redirected to GetApps to download it."
This password is used for several apps, which is risky. Change it as soon as possible.
Password is used for multiple apps

"This password was detected in a previous data breach and may have been leaked. Change it as soon as possible. Passwords will redirect you to the corresponding app or web page to change it. If you haven't downloaded the app, you'll be redirected to GetApps to download it."
One of your passwords may be compromised. Change it as soon as possible.

"This password is weak and easily guessed. Change it for your security. Passwords will redirect you to the corresponding app or web page to change it. If you haven't downloaded the app, you'll be redirected to GetApps to download it."
This password is easy to guess. Change it as soon as possible.
You can sync your passwords in Settings > Manage passwords
Turn on \"Sync passwords with Xiaomi Cloud\" in Settings
Passwords from Password manager are waiting to be synced to this device
Sync your accounts and passwords to Xiaomi Cloud and use items stored in the cloud to quickly fill in account info across devices
Sync your accounts and passwords to Xiaomi Cloud to quickly fill in account info across devices
Turn on sync to quickly fill in passwords across devices
Save your passwords and passkeys to the cloud and use them across all your devices

Passwords performs security checks without knowing your actual passwords. Xiaomi prioritizes user privacy. Therefore, during password security checks, Passwords uses a sophisticated mechanism to ensure that neither Xiaomi nor any third party can access your actual passwords. Your passwords are never shared with Xiaomi, and no information derived from your passwords will be used by Xiaomi.

"We compare the passwords you've saved in Passwords with known leaked password databases to see if any of your passwords have been exposed online. These databases are continuously updated to reflect the latest reported password breaches."

"While checking for compromised passwords, Passwords won't know your actual passwords. Instead, it compares hash values. To make sure Xiaomi can't determine the number of your passwords, all passwords are tested in fixed-size batches. If a batch has fewer passwords than the fixed size, random passwords are added to fill the batch before testing."

"If any of your passwords appear multiple times in large leaked password databases, they are considered high-risk. To make sure no one can know which of your passwords are high-risk, the test is performed in two steps: first, Xiaomi filters these high-risk passwords and sends them to your device. Matching with these high-risk passwords (using only hash values) occurs on your device. Only passwords that don't match high-risk entries will be synced to the cloud. The cloud only provides query addresses and can't identify who is making the request. Additionally, because passwords are checked in batches, the cloud only knows the number of passwords in a batch."

"We evaluate the strength of the passwords you've saved in Passwords using an on-device password strength framework. If a password is found to be weak, it will be flagged and you'll be notified. The entire process happens on your device and works without the network."

"We scan items saved in Passwords to see if the same password is used across multiple apps. If duplicates are found, all instances of the repeated password will be flagged and you'll be notified. The entire process happens on your device and works without the network."
Sync your accounts and passwords to Xiaomi Cloud to quickly fill in account info across devices
Allow this app to access camera to be able to scan QR codes or barcodes.
Items can be stored here for %d days. Tap to extend this period.
Replace the old password with the current one to have it be filled in automatically next time you sign in.
Grant permission to take photos and record video to be able to scan QR codes.
Grant permission to access the list of apps installed on the device to be able to manage app passwords.
Grant notification permissions to get alerts when a password is leaked.
"You're about to leave Passwords and use AI Scanner. Continue?"
One of your passwords may be compromised. Change it as soon as possible.
Check if your password is used for multiple accounts
Check if your passwords have been compromised online
Check if your password is easy to guess
This feature will check for passwords that may have security issues while fully protecting your privacy. Learn more
"If you delete passwords now, you'll have to enter them manually next time you sign in. Delete the password anyway?"
You can enter your passkey or scan the QR code to add a token
When you turn on \"Autofill passwords and passkeys\", Passwords will be used by default. Turn on now?
Your device will stop connecting to this network automatically. You might need to enter the password when you connect to this network again. Forget anyway?
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
